metadata.description: PavanMV's agent-harness plugins: mvp-plugin (repo adoption), code-intel (graph-first code intelligence), and codex-adapter (OpenAI Codex from Claude Code).

plugins.name: mvp-plugin
plugins.description: Run /mvp-plugin:adopt to copy the self-contained agent harness into any repo: rules, skills, agents, hooks, CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md, and beads tracking. /mvp-plugin:doctor verifies wiring; /mvp-plugin:update re-syncs the core.

plugins.name: code-intel
plugins.description: Graph-first code intelligence: serena & CBM MCP servers + ast-grep, with a graph-first workflow skill and indexing commands. Query the symbol graph before reading files to cut tokens on large repos.

plugins.name: codex-adapter
plugins.description: Call OpenAI Codex (gpt-5.x) from Claude Code via `codex exec`. Roles, free-form delegation, true concurrency, no broker or single-instance lock.
